summary: Red Team Tranche II is a self-contained analytical-memory and provenance-spine handoff.
final_use_case: It matters because mature red-team review depends on preserving why a challenge was made and what boundary governed it.

instruments.instrument_name: Most self-contained; "Analytical Memory and Provenance Spine"; 14 new commands Data Schema And Persistence Plan
instruments.input: entities, records, IDs, tables, JSON structures, indexes, and state transitions
instruments.operation: Peacebuilding, conflict transformation, trauma, memory, and repair. Use source library peace/conflict, dehumanization, aggression, and memory sources as Book III and peace-room scaffolding. Vision: Make repair and violence pages peace/conflict-first, trauma-literate, and institutionally precise. Mechanism: Extract escalation, memory, dehumanization, perpetration, aggression, attachment, reconciliation, and repair mechanisms. Plan: Close-read Book III, Peace, violence, trauma, and atrocity pages before status.
